workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: I have this exec meeting notes from Fabrikam Residences that needs identify the blockers. Not urgent but would be good to have by EOD.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-12 10:38 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 10:40 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fabrikam Residences deployment blockers

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-03 12:36 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
